_notes: Major Gulf oil and gas fields. production_mbpd is pre-crisis capacity. must_transit_hormuz = true if the field has no pipeline bypass. Coordinates are approximate field centroids.

fields.name: Ghawar
fields.notes: World's largest conventional oil field. Production has declined from peak ~5 Mbpd. Primary exit via Abqaiq processing → Ras Tanura or East-West Pipeline.

fields.name: Ras Tanura Export Terminal
fields.notes: World's largest crude oil export terminal. Marine terminal on Persian Gulf coast — ALL exports from here go through Hormuz. Key chokepoint for Saudi exports even with Petroline available.

fields.name: Burgan
fields.notes: World's second-largest oil field. Kuwait has no pipeline bypass — all exports must transit Hormuz. Kuwait CEO cited 3-4 month recovery timeline post-blockade.

fields.name: Rumaila
fields.notes: World's third-largest oil field. Basra crude primarily exported via offshore Basra Oil Terminal (KAAOT/ABOT). No practical bypass — Iraq-Turkey pipeline only handles Kirkuk.

fields.name: Kirkuk
fields.notes: Only major Iraqi field with Hormuz bypass via Kirkuk-Ceyhan pipeline to Turkey. Often disrupted.

fields.name: Upper Zakum
fields.notes: Offshore UAE field. Abu Dhabi crude can use ADCOP pipeline to Fujairah to bypass Hormuz.

fields.name: Murban / Bu Hasa
fields.notes: UAE's primary onshore field complex. ADNOC flagship production.

fields.name: North Field (Qatar) / South Pars (Iran)
fields.notes: World's largest single natural gas field (shared structure with Iran's South Pars). ALL Qatar LNG must transit Hormuz — there is no bypass. Ras Laffan LNG complex processes this gas. 17% LNG export capacity degraded for up to 5 years per QatarEnergy CEO after Ras Laffan damage.

fields.name: South Pars
fields.notes: Iran's portion of the North Field / South Pars structure. Iran is also the power enforcing the blockade — paradoxically Iran also exports via this strait.

fields.name: Ahvaz-Aghajari complex
fields.notes: Iran's largest oil field complex. Iran's primary export terminal is Kharg Island.

fields.name: Kharg Island Export Terminal
fields.notes: Iran's main crude oil export terminal. Handles ~90% of Iran's oil exports.
